# The Flight Centre Travel & Tours

> Pakistan's IATA-certified travel agency operating from Gujranwala since 2005. We provide Umrah packages, international tour packages, flight ticket booking, hotel reservations, visit visa documentation, and travel insurance for clients across Pakistan.

## Key Facts

- **Legal name**: The Flight Centre Travel & Tours
- **Headquarters**: Office 36-37, Jinnah Stadium, Gujranwala, Punjab 52250, Pakistan
- **Branch office**: Plaza 18, Neelum Block, DC Colony, Gujranwala, Pakistan
- **UAN**: 111-786-788
- **Phone**: +92 304 111 9786 (24/7 helpdesk)
- **Email**: info@tfctours.com.pk
- **CEO**: Rana Khalid Parvez Khan
- **Certifications**: IATA certified
- **Languages**: English, Urdu (website fully bilingual)
- **Areas served**: Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain
- **Founding year**: ~20+ years of operation as of 2026

## Core Services

- **Umrah Packages** — 15-day, 21-day, 28-day from Pakistan; hotel near Haram, air ticket, Umrah visa, ground transport, Ziyarat. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/umrah-packages
- **Tour Packages** — Dubai, Malaysia, Thailand, Singapore, Bahrain, Azerbaijan, Oman, Cambodia, Sri Lanka, Iran, Indonesia, 50+ destinations. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/tour-packages
- **Airline Ticket Booking** — All domestic and international airlines. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/ticket-booking
- **Hotel Booking** — Worldwide hotels with best-price guidance. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/hotel-booking
- **Visit Visa Services** — Documentation guidance and application support for all countries. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/visit-visa
- **Travel Insurance** — Medical, trip cancellation, baggage protection, worldwide coverage. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/travel-insurance
- **Saudi Wakala** — Authorised wakala processing for Umrah and Hajj groups. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/saudi-wakala
- **Work Visa Services** — Documentation and application support. URL: https://www.tfctours.com/services/work-visa

## Online Tools

- **Tour Cost Calculator**: https://www.tfctours.com/tour-calculator
- **Umrah Cost Calculator**: https://www.tfctours.com/umrah-calculator
- **Flight Booking Portal**: https://www.theflightcentre.pk/
- **B2B Agent Portal**: https://agent.tfctours.com/

## Guides

- [Saudi Visa Guide](https://www.tfctours.com/guides/saudi-visa-guide): Step-by-step guidance for Umrah/Hajj visa applications from Pakistan.
- [Visit Visa Guide](https://www.tfctours.com/guides/visit-visa-guide): Tourist visa documentation requirements and process by country.

- English: https://www.tfctours.com/
- Urdu (اردو): https://www.tfctours.com/ur
